Shutdown discovery server. void * acds_client_handler (void *arg)
Per-client connection handler (thread entry point).

Macro Definition Documentation

#define ACDS_CREATE_TRANSPORT( socket, transport_var)

Value:

acip_transport_t *transport_var = acip_tcp_transport_create("transport_acds_discovery", socket, NULL);               \
if (!transport_var) {                                                                                                \


  log_error("Failed to create ACDS transport");                                                                      \


  return;                                                                                                            \
}

    src/discovery-service/server.c.


322 #define ACDS_CREATE_TRANSPORT(socket, transport_var)                                                                   \
323   acip_transport_t *transport_var = acip_tcp_transport_create("transport_acds_discovery", socket, NULL);               \
324   if (!transport_var) {                                                                                                \
325     log_error("Failed to create ACDS transport");                                                                      \
326     return;                                                                                                            \
327   }










#define
  ACDS_DESTROY_TRANSPORT( transport_var)


Value:


acip_transport_destroy(transport_var)






Definition at line 329 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


Referenced by acds_client_handler().








Function
  Documentation




void
  * acds_client_handler (void * arg)


Per-client connection handler (thread entry point). Processes ACIP
    packets from a connected client. Handles crypto handshake, then dispatches
    packets to session/signaling handlers.




Parameters


arg Pointer to client connection context


Returns


NULL (thread exit value)


Definition at line 821 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


821                                      {
822   tcp_client_context_t *ctx = (tcp_client_context_t *)arg;
823   if (!ctx) {
824     log_error("Client handler: NULL context");
825     return NULL;
826   }
827 
828   acds_server_t *server = (acds_server_t *)ctx->user_data;
829   socket_t client_socket = ctx->client_socket;
830 
831   // Get client IP for logging
832   char client_ip[INET6_ADDRSTRLEN] = {0};
833   tcp_client_context_get_ip(ctx, client_ip, sizeof(client_ip));
834 
835   log_info("Client handler started for %s", client_ip);
836 
837   // Register client in TCP server registry with allocated client data
838   acds_client_data_t *client_data = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(acds_client_data_t), acds_client_data_t *);
839   if (!client_data) {
840     tcp_server_reject_client(client_socket, "Failed to allocate client data");
841     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
842     return NULL;
843   }
844   memset(client_data, 0, sizeof(*client_data));
845   client_data->joined_session = false;
846   client_data->handshake_complete = false;
847 
848   // Initialize crypto handshake context with client IP name
849   char crypto_name[96];
850   SAFE_SNPRINTF(crypto_name, sizeof(crypto_name), "crypto_discovery_client_%s", client_ip);
851   asciichat_error_t handshake_result = crypto_handshake_init(crypto_name, &client_data->handshake_ctx, true);
852   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
853     log_error("Failed to initialize crypto handshake for client %s", client_ip);
854     SAFE_FREE(client_data);
855     tcp_server_reject_client(client_socket, "Failed to initialize crypto handshake");
856     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
857     return NULL;
858   }
859 
860   // Set server identity keys for handshake
861   client_data->handshake_ctx.server_public_key.type = KEY_TYPE_ED25519;
862   client_data->handshake_ctx.server_private_key.type = KEY_TYPE_ED25519;
863   memcpy(client_data->handshake_ctx.server_public_key.key, server->identity_public, 32);
864   memcpy(client_data->handshake_ctx.server_private_key.key.ed25519, server->identity_secret, 64);
865 
866   if (tcp_server_add_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket, client_data) != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
867     SAFE_FREE(client_data);
868     tcp_server_reject_client(client_socket, "Failed to register client in registry");
869     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
870     return NULL;
871   }
872 
873   log_debug("Client %s registered (socket=%d, total=%zu)", client_ip, client_socket,
874             tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server));
875 
876   // Perform crypto handshake (three-step process)
877   log_debug("Performing crypto handshake with client %s", client_ip);
878 
879   // Step 1: Start handshake (send server key, receive client key)
880   handshake_result = crypto_handshake_server_start_socket(&client_data->handshake_ctx, client_socket);
881   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
882     log_warn("Crypto handshake start failed for client %s", client_ip);
883     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
884     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
885     return NULL;
886   }
887 
888   // Step 2: Authentication challenge (if required)
889   handshake_result = crypto_handshake_server_auth_challenge_socket(&client_data->handshake_ctx, client_socket);
890   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
891     log_warn("Crypto handshake auth challenge failed for client %s", client_ip);
892     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
893     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
894     return NULL;
895   }
896 
897   // Step 3: Complete handshake (verify and finalize)
898   handshake_result = crypto_handshake_server_complete_socket(&client_data->handshake_ctx, client_socket);
899   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
900     log_warn("Crypto handshake complete failed for client %s", client_ip);
901     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
902     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
903     return NULL;
904   }
905 
906   client_data->handshake_complete = true;
907   log_info("Crypto handshake complete for client %s", client_ip);
908 
909   // Main packet processing loop
910   while (atomic_load_bool(&server->tcp_server.running)) {
911     packet_type_t packet_type;
912     void *payload = NULL;
913     size_t payload_size = 0;
914 
915     // Receive packet (blocking with system timeout)
916     int result = receive_packet(client_socket, &packet_type, &payload, &payload_size);
917     if (result < 0) {
918       // Check error context to distinguish timeout from actual disconnect
919       asciichat_error_context_t err_ctx;
920       bool has_context = HAS_ERRNO(&err_ctx);
921 
922       // Check if this is a timeout (non-fatal) or actual disconnect (fatal)
923       asciichat_error_t error = GET_ERRNO();
924       if (error == ERROR_NETWORK_TIMEOUT ||
925           (error == ERROR_NETWORK && has_context && strstr(err_ctx.context_message, "timed out") != NULL)) {
926         // Timeout waiting for next packet - this is normal, continue waiting
927         log_debug("Client %s: receive timeout, continuing to wait for packets", client_ip);
928         if (payload) {
929           buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
930         }
931         continue;
932       }
933 
934       // Actual disconnect or fatal error
935       log_info("Client %s disconnected", client_ip);
936       if (payload) {
937         buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
938       }
939       break;
940     }
941 
942     log_debug("Received packet type 0x%02X from %s, length=%zu", packet_type, client_ip, payload_size);
943 
944     // Multi-key session creation protocol: block non-PING/PONG/SESSION_CREATE messages
945     if (client_data->in_multikey_session_create) {
946       bool allowed =
947           (packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE || packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_DISCOVERY_PING ||
948            packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_PING || packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_PONG);
949 
950       if (!allowed) {
951         log_warn("Client %s sent packet type 0x%02X during multi-key session creation - only SESSION_CREATE/PING/PONG "
952                  "allowed",
953                  client_ip, packet_type);
954 
955         // Send error response
956         acip_transport_t *error_transport =
957             acip_tcp_transport_create("transport_acds_error_response", client_socket, NULL);
958         if (error_transport) {
959           acip_send_error(error_transport, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
960                           "Only SESSION_CREATE/PING/PONG allowed during multi-key session creation");
961           ACDS_DESTROY_TRANSPORT(error_transport);
962         }
963 
964         // Free payload and continue
965         if (payload) {
966           buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
967         }
968         continue;
969       }
970     }
971 
972     // O(1) ACIP array-based dispatch
973     // Set server context for callbacks
974     acip_acds_callbacks_t callbacks = g_acds_callbacks;
975     callbacks.app_ctx = server;
976 
977     asciichat_error_t dispatch_result =
978         acip_handle_acds_packet(NULL, packet_type, payload, payload_size, client_socket, client_ip, &callbacks);
979 
980     if (dispatch_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
981       log_warn("ACIP handler failed for packet type 0x%02X from %s: %s", packet_type, client_ip,
982                asciichat_error_string(dispatch_result));
983     }
984 
985     // Free payload (allocated by receive_packet via buffer_pool_alloc)
986     if (payload) {
987       buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
988     }
989   }
990 
991   // Cleanup
992   tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
993   log_debug("Client %s unregistered (total=%zu)", client_ip, tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server));
994 
995   socket_close(client_socket);
996   SAFE_FREE(ctx);
997 
998   log_info("Client handler finished for %s", client_ip);
999   return NULL;
1000 }






References ACDS_DESTROY_TRANSPORT,
    acip_handle_acds_packet(), acip_send_error(),
    acip_tcp_transport_create(), atomic_load_bool(),
    buffer_pool_free(), crypto_handshake_init(),
    crypto_handshake_server_auth_challenge_socket(),
    crypto_handshake_server_complete_socket(),
    crypto_handshake_server_start_socket(),
    acds_client_data_t::handshake_complete,
    acds_client_data_t::handshake_ctx,
    acds_server_t::identity_public,
    acds_server_t::identity_secret,
    acds_client_data_t::in_multikey_session_create,
    acds_client_data_t::joined_session, receive_packet(),
    tcp_client_context_get_ip(), acds_server_t::tcp_server,
    tcp_server_add_client(), tcp_server_get_client_count(),
    tcp_server_reject_client(), and
  tcp_server_remove_client().


Referenced by acds_server_init().






asciichat_error_t
  acds_server_init (acds_server_t * server, const acds_config_t *
  config)


Initialize discovery server. Loads or generates identity keys,
    opens database, creates session registry, and binds TCP socket.




Parameters


server Server structure to initialize


config Configuration from command-line parsing


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 189 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


189                                                                                        {
190   if (!server || !config) {
191     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "server or config is NULL");
192   }
193 
194   memset(server, 0, sizeof(*server));
195   memcpy(&server->config, config, sizeof(acds_config_t));
196 
197   // Open database (SQLite as single source of truth)
198   asciichat_error_t result = database_init(config->database_path, &server->db);
199   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
200     return result;
201   }
202 
203   // Initialize rate limiter with SQLite backend
204   server->rate_limiter = rate_limiter_create_sqlite(NULL); // NULL = externally managed DB
205   if (!server->rate_limiter) {
206     database_close(server->db);
207     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to create rate limiter");
208   }
209 
210   // Set the database handle for the rate limiter
211   rate_limiter_set_sqlite_db(server->rate_limiter, server->db);
212 
213   // Configure TCP server
214   tcp_server_config_t tcp_config = {
215       .port = config->port,
216       .ipv4_address = (config->address[0] != '\0') ? config->address : NULL,
217       .ipv6_address = (config->address6[0] != '\0') ? config->address6 : NULL,
218       .bind_ipv4 = (config->address[0] != '\0') || (config->address[0] == '\0' && config->address6[0] == '\0'),
219       .bind_ipv6 = (config->address6[0] != '\0') || (config->address[0] == '\0' && config->address6[0] == '\0'),
220       .accept_timeout_sec = 1,
221       .client_handler = acds_client_handler,
222       .user_data = server,
223   };
224 
225   // Initialize TCP server
226   result = tcp_server_init(&server->tcp_server, &tcp_config);
227   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
228     rate_limiter_destroy(server->rate_limiter);
229     database_close(server->db);
230     return result;
231   }
232 
233   // Initialize background worker thread pool
234   atomic_store_bool(&server->shutdown, false);
235   server->worker_pool = thread_pool_create("acds_workers");
236   if (!server->worker_pool) {
237     log_warn("Failed to create worker thread pool");
238     tcp_server_destroy(&server->tcp_server);
239     rate_limiter_destroy(server->rate_limiter);
240     database_close(server->db);
241     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to create worker thread pool");
242   }
243 
244   // Spawn cleanup thread in worker pool
245   if (thread_pool_spawn(server->worker_pool, cleanup_thread_func, server, 0, "cleanup") != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
246     log_warn("Failed to spawn cleanup thread (continuing without cleanup)");
247   }
248 
249   log_info("Discovery server initialized successfully");
250   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
251 }






References acds_client_handler(),
    acds_config_t::address, acds_config_t::address6,
    atomic_store_bool(), acds_server_t::config,
    database_close(), database_init(),
    acds_config_t::database_path, acds_server_t::db,
    acds_config_t::port, acds_server_t::rate_limiter,
    rate_limiter_create_sqlite(), rate_limiter_destroy(),
    rate_limiter_set_sqlite_db(), acds_server_t::shutdown,
    acds_server_t::tcp_server, tcp_server_destroy(),
    tcp_server_init(), thread_pool_create(),
    thread_pool_spawn(), and acds_server_t::worker_pool.


Referenced by acds_main().






asciichat_error_t
  acds_server_run (acds_server_t * server)


Run discovery server main loop. Accepts client connections and
    spawns handler threads. Blocks until shutdown signal received.




Parameters


server Initialized server structure


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 253 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


253                                                          {
254   if (!server) {
255     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "server is NULL");
256   }
257 
258   log_info("Discovery server accepting connections on port %d", server->config.port);
259 
260   // Delegate to TCP server abstraction
261   return tcp_server_run(&server->tcp_server);
262 }






References acds_server_t::config,
    acds_config_t::port, acds_server_t::tcp_server, and
    tcp_server_run().


Referenced by acds_main().






void
  acds_server_shutdown (acds_server_t * server)


Shutdown discovery server. Closes listen socket, stops accepting
    connections, waits for handler threads to exit, closes database, and frees
    resources.




Parameters


server Server structure to clean up


Definition at line 264 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


264                                                  {
265   if (!server) {
266     return;
267   }
268 
269   // Signal shutdown to worker threads
270   atomic_store_bool(&server->shutdown, true);
271 
272   // Shutdown TCP server (closes listen sockets, stops accept loop)
273   tcp_server_destroy(&server->tcp_server);
274 
275   // Wait for all client handler threads to exit
276   size_t remaining_clients;
277   int shutdown_attempts = 0;
278   const int max_shutdown_attempts = 100; // 10 seconds (100 * 100ms)
279 
280   while ((remaining_clients = tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server)) > 0 &&
281          shutdown_attempts < max_shutdown_attempts) {
282     log_debug("Waiting for %zu client handler threads to exit (attempt %d/%d)", remaining_clients,
283               shutdown_attempts + 1, max_shutdown_attempts);
284     platform_sleep_ms(100);
285     shutdown_attempts++;
286   }
287 
288   if (remaining_clients > 0) {
289     log_warn("Server shutdown: %zu client handler threads still running after 10 seconds", remaining_clients);
290   } else if (shutdown_attempts > 0) {
291     log_debug("All client handler threads exited gracefully");
292   }
293 
294   // Stop and destroy worker thread pool (cleanup thread, etc.)
295   if (server->worker_pool) {
296     thread_pool_destroy(server->worker_pool);
297     server->worker_pool = NULL;
298     log_debug("Worker thread pool stopped");
299   }
300 
301   // Destroy rate limiter
302   if (server->rate_limiter) {
303     rate_limiter_destroy(server->rate_limiter);
304     server->rate_limiter = NULL;
305   }
306 
307   // Close database
308   if (server->db) {
309     database_close(server->db);
310     server->db = NULL;
311   }
312 
313   log_info("Server shutdown complete");
314 }






References atomic_store_bool(), database_close(),
    acds_server_t::db, platform_sleep_ms(),
    acds_server_t::rate_limiter, rate_limiter_destroy(),
    acds_server_t::shutdown, acds_server_t::tcp_server,
    tcp_server_destroy(), tcp_server_get_client_count(),
    thread_pool_destroy(), and acds_server_t::worker_pool.
